text: Just shipped a refactor in newsbox: ADAPTER_REGISTRY is now the single source of truth.
Short preview text of a longer note...

result.text: This is the FULL expanded body of a note_tweet (X Premium long post). It vastly exceeds 280 chars and represents the canonical long-form text that twikit exposes via tweet._data['note_tweet']['note_tweet_results']['result']['text']. newsbox TwikitAdapter is expected to prefer this full text over tweet.text for the body field, while is_long_form should be 'note_tweet'.

text: Quoting a great take on RSS reliability.
